pi_items.metadata_value: Modeled after Capital Bikeshare open data system
pi_items.verified_value: Modeled after Capital Bikeshare open data system
pi_items.source: setup_task.sh contains a python script that synthetically generates data modeling DC Capital Bikeshare stations.
task description and verifier.py explicitly require this output file path.

Executed the setup_task.sh python script which confirmed exactly 5000 trips are generated. Lincoln Memorial consistently results in a surplus (e.g., +204 net fleet change) because it's weighted as a destination, while 14th & V St NW results in a deficit (e.g., -130 net fleet change) because it's weighted as an origin.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated data that models the Capital Bikeshare system. Independent verification by executing the setup script confirms the generation of exactly 5000 trips, with 'Lincoln Memorial' consistently acting as a destination (resulting in a fleet surplus) and '14th & V St NW' acting as an origin (resulting in a fleet deficit), exactly matching the metadata claims.
